projects.name: cushlabs-opportunity-engine
projects.title: Opportunity Engine
projects.description: Broken link building opportunity finder for SEO — CushLabs AI Services
projects.summary: > Automated broken link discovery and AI-scored replacement opportunities for SEO outreach.
projects.tagline: AI-powered broken link discovery and scoring for SEO outreach automation
projects.problem:
Broken link building is one of the most effective white-hat SEO strategies, but the
manual process is brutal — searching for resource pages, clicking every outbound link
to find 404s, evaluating whether each broken link is worth pursuing, and tracking it
all across multiple niches and businesses. Opportunity Engine automates the entire
pipeline from SERP discovery through AI-scored opportunity ranking.
keyFeatures: Full pipeline from SERP discovery to scored opportunities in a single CLI command
Claude AI evaluates replacement feasibility against actual business services
Async link checking with per-domain rate limiting and retry with exponential backoff
Context-preserving pipeline carries anchor text and DOM context through every step
Supports multiple business niches with distinct search patterns and scoring criteria

projects.name: cushlabs-OS-dashboard
projects.title: CushLabs OS Dashboard
projects.description: Internal ops dashboard — live GitHub portfolio analytics for CushLabs
projects.summary: **Live:** [dashboard.cushlabs.ai](https://dashboard.cushlabs.ai)
projects.tagline: Full-stack operational command center with 7 API routes, 7 dashboard views, and live GitHub integration for portfolio health, goals, tasks, and business development
projects.problem:
Running a consultancy across 15+ GitHub repositories creates operational blind spots
that no single tool solves. Portfolio health, task execution, goal progress, business
development pipeline, accomplishment tracking, and infrastructure status all live in
separate systems or structured JSON files with no unified view. Project managers and
business owners need a single command center to see everything at a glance — not
repo-by-repo GitHub audits or spreadsheet juggling.
keyFeatures: 7 server-side API routes handling authentication, data aggregation, caching, and health checks
7 dashboard views — portfolio, business dev, goals, tasks, accomplishments, infrastructure, guide
Real-time portfolio analytics with revenue stream breakdown, language distribution, and staleness alerts
Business development pipeline with conversion funnel, win rates, and activity trends
Goal monitoring across 4 time horizons (daily/weekly/quarterly/annual) with visual progress review
Full accomplishment tracking with search, category/week filters, and timeline + grid views
Infrastructure health monitoring with response time charts and SSL certificate tracking
Enrichment overlay architecture — live GitHub metrics merged with business context at request time
metrics: 7 specialized dashboard views from a single authenticated interface
7 server-side API routes with 2-hour caching and manual refresh bypass
15+ repositories monitored with real-time commit, star, and staleness metrics
4 goal time horizons tracked with automated staleness warnings
Sub-second client-side filtering across all interactive views

slides.altEn: Title slide — CushLabs OS: The Full-Stack Operational Command Center, aggregating GitHub, strategy, and infrastructure into a single pane of glass
slides.altEs: Diapositiva de titulo — CushLabs OS: El Centro de Comando Operacional Full-Stack, agregando GitHub, estrategia e infraestructura en un solo panel

slides.altEn: Problem slide — Operational awareness drowning in fragmentation: context switching fatigue, stale data, hidden risks, and accumulated decision debt
slides.altEs: Diapositiva del problema — La conciencia operacional se ahoga en la fragmentacion: fatiga por cambio de contexto, datos obsoletos, riesgos ocultos y deuda de decisiones acumulada

slides.altEn: Solution slide — Bring order to chaos through a single pane of glass: one login secured by GitHub OAuth, one URL entirely aggregated, seven views merging code, business, and infrastructure
slides.altEs: Diapositiva de solucion — Ordenar el caos a traves de un solo panel: un inicio de sesion con GitHub OAuth, una URL completamente agregada, siete vistas que fusionan codigo, negocio e infraestructura

slides.altEn: Portfolio view — Audit repository health and business impact simultaneously: staleness risk flags, tier classification, revenue metrics, and language distribution alongside commit history
slides.altEs: Vista de portafolio — Auditar simultaneamente la salud del repositorio y el impacto comercial: alertas de obsolescencia, clasificacion por nivel, metricas de ingresos y distribucion de lenguajes junto al historial de commits

slides.altEn: Business dev view — Map pipeline trajectories without a separate CRM: conversion funnels from applications through proposals to outreach, with win rates and platform breakdowns
slides.altEs: Vista de desarrollo de negocios — Mapear trayectorias del pipeline sin un CRM separado: embudos de conversion desde aplicaciones hasta propuestas y alcance, con tasas de exito y desgloses por plataforma

slides.altEn: Comparison slide — Transforming reactive managers into proactive commanders: automated staleness alerts, unified pipeline visibility, live infrastructure pulses, and goal tracking across four horizons
slides.altEs: Diapositiva comparativa — Transformando gerentes reactivos en comandantes proactivos: alertas automaticas de obsolescencia, visibilidad unificada del pipeline, pulsos de infraestructura en vivo y seguimiento de metas en cuatro horizontes

slides.altEn: Closing slide — Your operational command center is ready: stop juggling tabs and start commanding your portfolio from a single pane of glass
slides.altEs: Diapositiva de cierre — Su centro de comando operacional esta listo: deje de alternar pestanas y comience a comandar su portafolio desde un solo panel

projects.name: ny-eng
projects.title: NY English Teacher
projects.description: Professional bilingual (EN/ES) business English coaching platform built with Astro, featuring interactive assessments, lead generation, content management, and booking integration. Optimized for SEO, performance, and conversion.
projects.summary: **Executive English coaching platform for professionals who need to command the room.**
projects.tagline: Lead generation platform replacing 4 roles on $0/month infrastructure
projects.problem: Solo professional service providers burn 10-15 hours per week on manual qualification, scheduling ping-pong, and follow-ups. Their websites look identical to commodity competitors, making it impossible to justify premium pricing while the Spanish-speaking professional market remains underserved.
projects.solution: A fully automated lead generation platform that functions as four digital employees — SDR, marketing department, executive assistant, and brand manager — on free-tier infrastructure. Every conversation steers toward booking, every page justifies premium pricing, and the full EN/ES bilingual system doubles the addressable market from a single codebase.
keyFeatures: 4 role-specific diagnostic quizzes pre-qualify leads with mapped communication gaps — no discovery calls needed
3-step booking flow via Cloudflare Workers + Google Calendar OAuth — interest to confirmed Google Meet in under 60 seconds
Full EN/ES bilingual mirror with localized routing (/es/servicios/, /es/reservar/) and bidirectional hreflang SEO
Premium positioning hard-coded into UX — named executive testimonials from Driscoll's, CEVA Logistics, no discount codes
$0/month infrastructure — Astro static, Cloudflare Workers free tier, Neon free tier, Vercel serverless free tier
metrics: 100 Lighthouse performance score — zero database queries on page load
< 60 seconds from interest to confirmed booking with Google Meet link
2x addressable market from a single codebase via bilingual system
10-15 hours/week of administrative and sales work automated away

slides.altEs: La Arquitectura de la Autoridad — Construyendo presencia de agencia multinacional con un equipo de uno

slides.altEn: An Automated Performance Engine — Zero manual qualification, 60-second booking flow, 100% gross margin
slides.altEs: Un Motor de Rendimiento Automatizado — Cero calificacion manual, reserva en 60 segundos, 100% margen bruto

projects.name: context-writing-system
projects.title: AI Writing System
projects.description: Context-engineering system to lock brand voice, enforce truth, and generate consistent AI-written content at scale.
projects.summary: > A context engineering framework that makes AI write like you, not like AI.
projects.tagline: Clone your brand voice once — AI writes like you across every channel, no drift
projects.problem: AI-generated content starts strong but drifts into generic corporate filler within minutes. Teams spend more time editing AI output than they saved generating it — killing hype, restoring voice, and fact-checking hallucinated claims. Every new chat session starts from zero because there's no persistent memory of who you are, what you sell, or what you're allowed to say.
keyFeatures: First drafts arrive ready for review, not rewriting
Editing time reduced from 45 minutes to 5 minutes per asset
Zero hallucinated claims — credibility enforced by policy
One voice system powers every content channel
Tool-agnostic — works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any RAG system

projects.name: ai-resume-tailor
projects.title: AI Resume Tailor
projects.description: Helps candidates create a tailored resume for a specific job.
projects.summary: > Bilingual AI-powered ATS resume optimization — instant structured feedback, zero friction, privacy by design.
projects.tagline: AI-powered ATS resume optimization with bilingual support and instant feedback
projects.problem:
Over 75% of resumes are rejected by Applicant Tracking Systems before a human ever sees them.
Job seekers submit into a black box with no visibility into why they're filtered out. Existing
tools charge upfront, require accounts, or provide generic advice not tied to the specific posting.
The Latin American market is further underserved by English-only tools.
keyFeatures: Structured ATS feedback in under 10 seconds
5 free analyses before any signup prompt — value delivered first
Zero resume data stored — privacy by architecture
Full EN/ES bilingual coverage across UI and AI-generated analysis
Guest-to-paid conversion funnel with embedded Stripe checkout

projects.summary: description: A bilingual income planning tool for freelancers and consultants.

projects.name: expat-driver-license-prep
projects.title: ExpatDrive — Bilingual Driver's License Exam Prep
projects.description: Bilingual study companion for English-speaking expats preparing for foreign driver's license exams. Practice tests, spaced repetition flashcards, vocabulary drills.
projects.summary: > Pass your driver's license exam in any country — even if you don't speak the language yet.
projects.tagline: Pass your driver's license exam in any country — even if you don't speak the language yet.
projects.problem:
English-speaking expats struggle to pass foreign driver's license exams due to
legal and technical terminology in unfamiliar languages. Existing resources are
fragmented, outdated, and rarely bilingual. ExpatDrive provides verified,
state-specific question banks with quality translations, spaced repetition
study tools, and step-by-step process guides.
keyFeatures: 103 official Jalisco questions translated, explained, and verified bilingually
Multiple study modes: practice exams, flashcards with SM-2 spaced repetition, vocabulary drills
Content architecture scales to new countries/states with zero code changes
Process guides cover documents, fees, procedures, and expat-specific tips
Built for Phase 2 expansion to CDMX, Nuevo Leon, and Quintana Roo

projects.name: stock-alert
projects.title: AI StockAlert
projects.description: Professional Windows desktop application for real-time multi-stock price monitoring with intelligent alerting and visual configuration management.
projects.summary: > AI StockAlert: Stock price monitoring with multi-channel alerts for Windows.
projects.tagline: Windows desktop app for real-time stock alerts via WhatsApp and Windows notifications
projects.problem: Active traders need to monitor multiple stock positions simultaneously but can't watch screens all day. Existing solutions are too complex, require expensive subscriptions, or lack reliable mobile notifications that actually get seen.
projects.solution: A professional Windows desktop application that monitors stock prices in real-time and sends instant alerts via both Windows toast notifications and WhatsApp messages when prices cross user-defined thresholds. It runs silently in the system tray with zero subscription fees.
keyFeatures: Real-time price monitoring for up to 15 stocks with configurable intervals and automatic market hours detection
Multi-channel alerts: Windows toast notifications with audio plus WhatsApp mobile messages via Twilio
Smart consolidated notifications — multiple alerts combined into a single notification per check cycle
Bilingual interface (EN/ES) with multi-currency display toggling between USD and MXN with live exchange rates
Background service runs silently in system tray — alerts work even when UI is closed, auto-starts with Windows
metrics: Sub-2-second alert delivery from price change detection to notification
15 stocks monitored simultaneously on free tier
60 API calls/minute rate-limited token bucket for optimal Finnhub usage

projects.name: comp-plan-simulator
projects.title: Compensation Plan Simulator
projects.description: Interactive compensation plan simulator for direct-selling companies
projects.summary: Interactive compensation plan simulator for direct-selling companies. Model commission structures, override percentages, and network parameters — then see real-time financial impact before making plan
projects.tagline: Model direct-selling comp plan changes in real time before rolling them out
projects.problem: Direct-selling companies live and die by their compensation plan, yet most design changes with spreadsheets and gut instinct. A 2-point override increase at the leader tier might sound harmless until it erodes $200K in annual margin — and nobody sees the ripple effects until it's too late.
projects.solution: A fully interactive client-side simulator that lets operations leaders configure two compensation plans side-by-side across 45 inputs and see instant financial impact via KPI dashboards, revenue waterfalls, payout distributions, and break-even curves — all shareable via URL with zero backend.
keyFeatures: 45 interactive inputs (18 per plan x 2 + 9 network params) with real-time financial recalculation
Side-by-side Current vs Proposed comparison with 6 KPIs, dollar deltas, and percentage deltas
Revenue waterfall, payout distribution, and break-even crossover charts via Recharts
Shareable URL state encoding — full scenario compressed into a link for team review
Full EN/ES bilingual support with dark/light themes and 4 built-in scenario presets
metrics: 4 chart types: waterfall, stacked bar, line with crossover, comparison table
Full state shareable via URL — zero backend, zero data exposure

slides.altEn: Compensation Plan Simulator — model the financial impact of comp plan changes before going live
slides.altEs: Simulador de Plan de Compensacion — modela el impacto financiero de cambios al plan antes de lanzarlos

slides.altEn: The Problem — spreadsheets and gut instinct drive decisions that affect margins and distributor retention
slides.altEs: El Problema — hojas de calculo e instinto impulsan decisiones que afectan margenes y retencion de distribuidores

slides.altEn: Configure Tab — adjust personal discounts, override rates, depth, and qualification rules across 3 tiers
slides.altEs: Pestana de Configuracion — ajusta descuentos, tasas de sobreescritura, profundidad y reglas por 3 niveles

slides.altEn: Financial Dashboard — 6 real-time KPIs with delta indicators against the alternate plan
slides.altEs: Dashboard Financiero — 6 KPIs en tiempo real con indicadores delta contra el plan alternativo

slides.altEn: Revenue Waterfall — stacked chart showing gross revenue through discounts, overrides, down to net margin
slides.altEs: Cascada de Ingresos — grafico apilado desde ingresos brutos, descuentos, sobreescrituras, hasta margen neto

slides.altEn: Break-Even Analysis — current vs proposed cost curves at up to 3x volume with crossover detection
slides.altEs: Analisis de Punto de Equilibrio — curvas de costo actual vs propuesto hasta 3x volumen con deteccion de cruce

slides.altEn: Comparison Table — side-by-side metrics with dollar deltas and color-coded good/bad indicators
slides.altEs: Tabla Comparativa — metricas lado a lado con deltas en dolares e indicadores de color bueno/malo

slides.altEn: 4 Scenario Presets — Default, Aggressive Overrides, Flat Structure, High Growth for rapid what-if analysis

projects.name: ai-portfolio
projects.title: AI Portfolio
projects.description: Static portfolio system that syncs project data from GitHub repos into a filterable showcase — Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
projects.summary: > A bilingual (EN/ES) static portfolio system that aggregates project data from GitHub repositories and renders a professional, filterable showcase with SEO optimization and WebP images.
projects.tagline: A static portfolio system that syncs project data from GitHub repos into a filterable showcase
projects.problem:
Maintaining a portfolio across dozens of GitHub repositories creates a content
management problem. Project descriptions, tech stacks, and status information
scatter across READMEs and repo settings with no unified display layer. A
separate portfolio site inevitably falls out of sync with the actual work.
keyFeatures: 21 projects aggregated from GitHub repos into a single filterable interface
Client-side search, category filtering, and sort — all via shareable URL params
Zero runtime API calls — fully static, sub-second page loads
Content managed through PORTFOLIO.md files co-located with source code
Sync issue notifications — errors and warnings auto-reported as GitHub Issues with deduplication and auto-close
Featured project showcase with curated top-6 selection
Dark mode with system preference detection

projects.name: ai-scrabble-practice
projects.title: AI Scrabble Practice
projects.description: A practice tool for Scrabble players built with React, Vite, Tailwind, and pnpm. Features include word scoring, word validation via free dictionary APIs, and a rack solver to generate playable words.
projects.summary: > AI-powered Scrabble practice suite with word validation, anagram solving, and intelligent hints — backed by a 370,000+ word dictionary.
projects.tagline: Five AI-powered practice tools backed by a 370K-word dictionary
projects.problem: Scrabble practice tools are either too simple (word checkers) or too powerful (board solvers) — neither builds actual skill. Players bounce between fragmented sites for validation, anagram solving, and word discovery with no structured practice mode.
keyFeatures: 370,105-word dictionary with sub-millisecond validation via Set-based O(1) lookups
Anagram solving in under 500ms for 7-tile hands with wildcard support
5 practice tools unified in a single bilingual interface
AI-powered natural language word search and timed practice with hints
Full E2E test coverage with Playwright across all features and locales

projects.name: marble-does-not-yield
projects.title: Marble Does Not Yield
projects.description: A cinematic, single-page storytelling experience built with Next.js 14—combining markdown-driven prose, bilingual content, scroll-triggered imagery, and accessibility-first design.
projects.summary: > A cinematic, single-page narrative experience that combines long-form bilingual storytelling with restrained animation, audio narration, and accessibility-first design.

projects.name: cushlabs-image-portfolio
projects.title: CushLabs Image Portfolio
projects.description: Modern image portfolio with lightbox gallery, drag-and-drop upload, and PWA support. Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4.
projects.summary: > A modern, dark-themed image gallery with authentication, lightbox slider, WhatsApp sharing, and PWA support — built for showcasing photography with style.
projects.tagline: Authenticated image gallery with lightbox, WhatsApp sharing, auto-WebP, and PWA support
projects.problem:
Sharing a curated photo collection shouldn't require a CMS or social media account.
Most gallery solutions are either bloated with unnecessary features or too basic to look professional.
This app provides an authenticated, minimal, high-quality image showcase with drag-and-drop upload,
automatic WebP optimization, WhatsApp sharing, and a native-app feel via PWA.
keyFeatures: Full masonry and grid gallery with animated transitions
Full-screen lightbox with swipe, keyboard, and click navigation
Drag-and-drop upload with auto WebP conversion and per-file progress
Clerk authentication with Google, Apple, and Facebook social login
WhatsApp and native share sheet integration from lightbox
PWA-ready for installation on mobile and desktop

Features a fully interactive appointment booking system with calendar integration, real-time data visualizations using Recharts, and 17+ accessible components. Mobile-first design, SEO optimized, and built with modern best practices. Perfect for SaaS apps, dashboards, and booking systems.
projects.summary: > A production-ready React template with ShadCN UI, data visualizations, and a complete interactive appointment booking showcase.
